# Kiro Spec — Embed playground into `#live` section, delete standalone pages

**Status:** READY FOR KIRO EXECUTION
**Generated by:** Claude Opus 4.7 (planning) for Kiro IDE execution.
**Goal:** Reverse the design mistake of two redundant pages (`/playground.html`
duplicates the existing `#live` section, `/dashboard.html` does not work on
Vercel). Embed the v0.6 features (model tier selector, delta-aware copy)
into the existing inline `#live` section, then delete the two standalone
pages and the hero CTAs that pointed to them. **Result: pure REEF-style
single-page experience preserved.**

> Atomic commit titled `ui(hero): embed v0.6 playground into #live, delete redundant pages`.

---

## Context

Audit of the index revealed `<section id="live">` (line 370 of
`public/index.html`) already contains a fully-functional inline pipeline UI:

- input `#target` (URL or term)
- 5 `.lens` buttons (gtm / finance / security / supply-chain / all)
- `.run` button "Analyze & Seal"
- 4-stage progress panel (FETCH / FORGE / CLASSIFY / PROVE)
- `.evidence` output area with seal + findings + custody + PDF download

The standalone `public/playground.html` (added in T3.1) **duplicated this
functionality**. The standalone `public/dashboard.html` (added in T2.4)
polls `.omc/state/v060-telemetry.jsonl` which **does not exist on Vercel**
(serverless functions are stateless). Both should be deleted; the
v0.6-specific feature (model tier selector) must be embedded inside the
existing `#live` section instead.

---

## Edits to apply

### Edit 1 — Delete `public/playground.html`

```bash
git rm public/playground.html
```

### Edit 2 — Delete `public/dashboard.html`

```bash
git rm public/dashboard.html
```

### Edit 3 — Remove the 3-button `.cta-row` from the hero, restore single CTA

In `public/index.html`, locate the block (around line 217-221):

```html
    <div class="cta-row">
      <a class="cta" href="#live">▶ Run the live pipeline</a>
      <a class="cta cta-secondary" href="/playground.html">Try the playground</a>
      <a class="cta cta-secondary" href="/dashboard.html">Live dashboard</a>
    </div>
```

Replace exactly with the original single-CTA pattern:

```html
    <div><a class="cta" href="#live">▶ Run the live pipeline</a></div>
```

Then locate and **remove** the three CSS rules that were added for the
3-button row (search for `.cta-row{` in the same file):

```css
.cta-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;align-items:center;}
.cta-secondary{background:transparent;border:1px solid currentColor;color:inherit;}
.cta-secondary:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
```

Delete those three lines from the `<style>` block.

### Edit 4 — Embed model tier selector inside `#live`

In `public/index.html`, locate the `<div class="lenses">` ... `</div>` block
inside the `#live` section (around lines 379-385). Immediately AFTER the
`</div>` of `.lenses` and BEFORE the `<button class="run" id="run">`,
insert this new block:

```html
      <label class="flabel" for="tier" style="margin-top:18px;display:block">Model tier <span style="color:var(--muted);font-weight:400">— v0.6 cost/quality tradeoff</span></label>
      <div class="lenses" id="tiers" role="group" aria-label="Model tier">
        <button class="lens" data-tier="oss" aria-pressed="true">OSS · DeepSeek (default)</button>
        <button class="lens" data-tier="paid" aria-pressed="false">PAID · DeepSeek thinking</button>
        <button class="lens" data-tier="free" aria-pressed="false" title="Labeled free-low-quality per docs/v060-calibration.md">FREE · Nemotron 9B ⚠</button>
      </div>
```

(Reuses the existing `.lens` button styles so it matches the lens chips
visually with zero new CSS.)

### Edit 5 — Update FORGE stage meta line (3 layers, 131 rules)

In `public/index.html`, locate this exact line (around line 391):

```html
          <div class="stage" data-st="FORGE"><span class="fill"></span><div class="row"><span class="nm">FORGE</span><span class="meta">dedup + 78 DJL + 28 prefilter · pre-LLM</span><span class="ms"></span><span class="dot"></span></div></div>
```

Replace the `meta` text:

```html
          <div class="stage" data-st="FORGE"><span class="fill"></span><div class="row"><span class="nm">FORGE</span><span class="meta">dedup + 78 DJL + 28 prefilter + 25 PII · 3 layers</span><span class="ms"></span><span class="dot"></span></div></div>
```

### Edit 6 — Update PROVE stage meta line (delta_chain)

In `public/index.html`, locate this exact line (around line 393):

```html
          <div class="stage" data-st="PROVE"><span class="fill"></span><div class="row"><span class="nm">PROVE</span><span class="meta">HMAC-SHA256 + RFC 3161 TSA</span><span class="ms"></span><span class="dot"></span></div></div>
```

Replace the `meta` text:

```html
          <div class="stage" data-st="PROVE"><span class="fill"></span><div class="row"><span class="nm">PROVE</span><span class="meta">HMAC-SHA256 + RFC 3161 TSA + delta_chain (v0.6)</span><span class="ms"></span><span class="dot"></span></div></div>
```

### Edit 7 — Update download button text (6-7 pages)

In `public/index.html`, locate the download button line (around line 400):

```html
          <button class="dl hidden" id="dl">📥 Download Evidence Report (PDF · 6 pages)</button>
```

Replace with:

```html
          <button class="dl hidden" id="dl">📥 Download Evidence Report (PDF · 6 pages, 7 when delta)</button>
```

### Edit 8 — Update sample PDF link copy (around line 375)

In `public/index.html`, locate:

```html
    <p class="lede" style="text-align:center;margin:10px auto 0;font-size:13px">Rather not run it? <a href="https://github.com/SuarezPM/apohara-synthex/blob/main/samples/synthex-evidence-report.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener" style="text-decoration:underline">📄 See a real 6-page Evidence Report (sample PDF)</a> — sealed with HMAC-SHA256 + RFC&nbsp;3161.</p>
```

Replace `6-page Evidence Report` with `6-7 page Evidence Report (7th page when delta_chain present)`.

### Edit 9 — Wire tier selection into the JS that calls `/api/analyze`

In `public/index.html`, find the existing inline `<script>` block that
handles the `#run` button click and POSTs to `/api/analyze`. (Search for
`fetch("/api/analyze"` or `fetch('/api/analyze'` or the `id="run"`
event handler.)

**Two surgical additions:**

(a) Replicate the tier-button toggle behavior already used by `.lenses`.
After the existing tier buttons are wired, the chosen tier must be readable.
Pattern: when a `#tiers .lens` button is clicked, toggle `aria-pressed`
exclusively within `#tiers` (only one tier active at a time, just like
the existing `data-lens="all"` mutual-exclusion in the lens group).

(b) Where the POST body to `/api/analyze` is constructed, **read the
currently-pressed tier from `#tiers .lens[aria-pressed=true]`** and include
it in the body:

```js
const tierEl = document.querySelector('#tiers .lens[aria-pressed=true]');
const tier = tierEl ? tierEl.dataset.tier : undefined;

// then in the POST body, ADD `tier` next to the existing `target` and `lens`:
body: JSON.stringify({ target, lens, ...(tier ? { tier } : {}) }),
```

The existing `api/analyze.js` already accepts `tier` and resolves it to the
correct model id (from commit `8516e4b`). No backend change needed.

### Edit 10 — Update README "v0.6.0 — Watch & Prove" section

In `README.md`, find the v0.6.0 section (added by Kiro in commit `cf898d9`).
Remove the two bullet lines that point to the deleted pages:

```markdown
- **`/playground.html`** — try it yourself, paste a URL, pick a tier + lens,
  download the signed PDF.
- **`/dashboard.html`** — live stress KPIs, polls `.omc/state/v060-telemetry.jsonl`.
```

Replace those two bullets with **one** bullet:

```markdown
- **Try it inline** in the `#live` section of [synthex.apohara.dev](https://synthex.apohara.dev) —
  paste a URL, pick a lens + model tier (OSS / PAID / FREE), watch the 4
  stages execute in real time against Bright Data, download the 6-7 page
  signed PDF. No separate playground page needed — everything lives in
  one REEF-style scroll.
```

---

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `ls public/playground.html` returns "No such file" (Edit 1).
- [ ] `ls public/dashboard.html` returns "No such file" (Edit 2).
- [ ] `grep -c "cta-row" public/index.html` returns 0 (Edit 3).
- [ ] `grep -c "cta-secondary" public/index.html` returns 0 (Edit 3).
- [ ] `grep -c 'id="tiers"' public/index.html` returns 1 (Edit 4).
- [ ] `grep -c 'data-tier=' public/index.html` returns 3 (Edit 4).
- [ ] `grep -c "25 PII" public/index.html` returns 1 (Edit 5).
- [ ] `grep -c "delta_chain (v0.6)" public/index.html` returns 1 (Edit 6).
- [ ] `grep -c "6-7 page" public/index.html` returns 2 (Edits 7+8).
- [ ] `grep -c "playground.html" README.md` returns 0 (Edit 10).
- [ ] `grep -c "dashboard.html" README.md` returns 0 (Edit 10).
- [ ] `grep -c 'Try it inline' README.md` returns 1 (Edit 10).
- [ ] `npm test` passes 262 / 252 / 0 fail.
- [ ] `npm run lint:slides` exits 0.
- [ ] `git diff --stat` shows 3 files changed: `README.md`, `public/index.html`, plus 2 deletions for `public/playground.html` and `public/dashboard.html`.

## Commit

```
ui(hero): embed v0.6 playground into #live, delete redundant pages

The standalone /playground.html duplicated the existing #live section.
The standalone /dashboard.html polls .omc/state/*.jsonl which does NOT
exist in Vercel (serverless is stateless). Both are deleted.

The v0.6-specific feature (model tier selector free/oss/paid) is now
embedded inside the existing #live section as a third .lens row — reuses
the same chip styling, zero new CSS.

FORGE meta updated to "dedup + 78 DJL + 28 prefilter + 25 PII · 3 layers".
PROVE meta updated to include "+ delta_chain (v0.6)".
PDF copy updated to "6-7 pages (7 when delta_chain present)".

README v0.6 section updated to reflect the inline embed (no separate page).

Honest reversal of T2.4 + T3.1 design choices that fragmented the
REEF-style single-page experience.

Spec source: .kiro/specs/embed-playground-into-index.md (Claude Opus 4.7),
executed by Kiro.

Co-Authored-By: Kiro <noreply@kiro.dev>
```

## Notes for Kiro

- Do NOT touch any `src/`, `test/`, `scripts/`, `api/`, `.github/`,
  `package.json`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `SLIDES.md`.
- The model tier reuses `.lens` class — match the visual exactly with
  the existing lens chips. No new CSS needed.
- For Edit 9 (JS wiring), keep the diff minimal: locate the existing
  `#run` click handler, add the two new lines (tier read + body include)
  and the tier-toggle mirroring the existing lens-toggle pattern. If the
  existing lens toggle is delegated, mirror that delegation for tier.
- Push to `origin/main` after commit. Vercel auto-redeploys in ~30 s.
